ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($User.Username = "jdeintnactd@carrier.com.corp",RecordType.DeveloperName != 'NAC', AND ( Country = "CA", OR( LEN(State) != 2, NOT( CONTAINS("AB:BC:MB:NB:NL:NT:NS:NU:ON:PE:QC:SK:YT", State) ))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a valid Canada Province.
